libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use the relocated APIs under `shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*`, not unshaded `com.fasterxml.jackson.*`. If tests exercise Jackson internals involving `EnumSet`, `EnumMap`, `GregorianCalendar`, or `ClassUtil` reflection, configure the test JVM and native-image build args with `--add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED`. No environment variables or system properties are otherwise indicated.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Adding external Jackson dependencies would not represent normal `parquet-jackson` usage and could mask the shaded artifact behavior.
The reported failure appears to be a Jackson 2.19 behavior/assertion change in enum introspection rather than missing setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: parquet-jackson is a self-contained shaded Jackson jar with no runtime dependency or service container needs; meaningful tests should target the relocated Jackson APIs and preserve the existing Java module open used for java.util-backed Jackson internals.
